---
title: "Test"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(aisdk)
library(evaluate)

# Mock eng_ai: skip LLM call, directly execute ggplot code
mock_ai_response <- function(options) {
  envir <- knitr::knit_global()
  code <- 'library(ggplot2); ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) + geom_point() + ggtitle("Test")'
  aisdk:::execute_code_safely(code, envir)
}
```

```{r test-plot, results='asis'}
# Simulate what eng_ai does for eval=TRUE with a ggplot
envir <- environment()
code <- 'library(ggplot2); print(ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) + geom_point())'

ev <- evaluate::evaluate(code, envir = envir, new_device = FALSE)
cat("Types returned by evaluate:\n")
for (x in ev) cat(" -", paste(class(x), collapse=","), "\n")

plots <- Filter(function(x) inherits(x, "recordedplot"), ev)
cat("Number of recordedplots:", length(plots), "\n")

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  opts <- knitr::opts_current$get()
  cat("opts label:", opts$label, "\n")
  cat("opts dev:", opts$dev, "\n")
  result <- tryCatch(
    knitr:::sew.recordedplot(plots[[1]], opts),
    error = function(e) paste("sew ERROR:", e$message)
  )
  cat("sew result:", result, "\n")
}
```
